results.rendered_html: bodhi—maṇḍa m. or n. (?) seat of wisdom (N. of the seats which were said to have risen out of the earth under 4 successive trees where Gautama Buddha attained to perfect wisdom),  MWB. 232  (cf. next).

results.rendered_html: bodhimaṇḍa (bo˚ + ma˚) der Sitz, welcher in Schatten des Bodhi- Baumes sich aus der Erde hervorgehoben haben soll, als Śākya zur Bodhi gelangte; in weiterer Bed. = bodhimaṇḍala,  VYUTP. 102 .  BURN. Intr. 387, N. 2 .  Lot. de la b. l. 349 .  LALIT. ed. Calc. 341,4 . 362,17 . 20 . 398,8 .  HIOUEN-THSANG I, 456 . 460 .  SCHIEFNER, Lebensb. 244 (14) .  WASSILJEW 42 .
